summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GharSetu real estate platform - backend APIs and frontend UI flows working correctly

integration_issues.issue: Property card clicks may not navigate to listing detail page consistently

passed_tests: Owner registration (/api/auth/register/owner) - creates owner with Aadhar details
Chatbot API (/api/chat) - GPT-5.2 integration working with Emergent key
Home page loads with hero section, categories (5), trending properties
All 5 category cards present (Home, Business, Stay, Event, Services)
User registration form with all fields (name, email, phone, password, gender, address)
Owner registration form with Aadhar card fields
Category navigation to individual category pages
Navigation menu shows all 5 categories and Reels button
Hero search functionality redirects to search results
Registration flows redirect to dashboard successfully
